behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all key paths, function names (renderModalStates, FullConfig, skillMode, clearedBy with tool/skill), command renames, SKILL.md path, frontmatter fields, and required commands documented.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change conceptually (rename, add field, wrap expression) without giving exact line numbers or code replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for general patterns (config.skillMode, clearedBy.skill/tool, '() => (', terminal/ + *.md) that any reasonable implementation would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run npm install/build/tsc/eslint subprocesses and execute Node to parse JSON, plus some text inspection for required structure.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test asserts on specific renames/properties/files that a stub couldn't satisfy without the actual changes.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All major behaviors from instruction (renames, modal config, evaluate wrap, SKILL.md, build copy, clearedBy type) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass command renames, modal state, SKILL.md) with descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: SKILL.md frontmatter schema (name, description fields) and clearedBy object schema are documented in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: Paths and command names appear consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction lists files to look at but doesn't pinpoint exact buggy lines; localization within those files is left to the agent.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Build.js change is a small copy-rule addition; not a full rewrite, and doesn't conflict with other files.
